name: search_contacts
description: Search for contacts using SendGrid's advanced query syntax based on email, name, custom fields, and metadata. Enables finding specific segments of your audience for targeted campaigns, analysis, or data enrichment.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query using SendGrid query syntax. Examples: 'email = "john@example.com"', 'first_name LIKE "John"', 'custom_fields.company = "Acme"', 'created_at > "2024-01-01"'

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Maximum 500. Default is 100.

parameters.name: page_token
parameters.description: Token for pagination. Use the token from the previous response to fetch the next page.
